title: Idhudhaanaa Lyrics Saamy
stanzas:
idhudhaanaa idhudhaanaa
edhirpaartha annaalum idhudhaanaa
ivan dhaanaa ivan dhaanaa
malar soottum manavaalan
ivan dhaanaa

pagalilum naan kanda
kanavugal nanavaaga
unadhaanaen naan unadhaanaen

thirumana naal enni
nagarndhidum yen naatkal
sugamaana oru sumayaanaen
idhazh pirikkaamal
kural yezhuppaamal
naan yenakkaana
oru paadal paadikolvaen

maadiyin valaivinil
ennai kandu pidippaai
paarkaadhavan poal
sirappaai nadippaai

vidumaena thirumbi
en idai valaippaai
padigalin adiyinil
yennai alli anaippaai

oorukkul anaivarum
unnai kandu nadunga
veetinil nee oru
kuzhandhayaai sinunga

perumayil yen mugam
innum minunga
iruvarin ulagamum
iruvaryil surunga
maghizhchiyil yendhan
manam malarndhidumae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Idhudhaanaa'?

The song 'Idhudhaanaa' expresses deep feelings of love and affection, portraying the emotions of a romantic relationship.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Saamy'?

In the movie Saamy, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer of 'Idhudhaanaa'?

The song is sung by the talented K.S. Chitra, known for her melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for 'Idhudhaanaa'?

The music for Idhudhaanaa was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, who is celebrated for his catchy and soulful tunes.

When was 'Idhudhaanaa' released?

'Idhudhaanaa' was released on May 1, 2003, as part of the Saamy soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Idhudhaanaa' from the movie Saamy beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and commitment. It portrays the protagonist's deep affection and dreams of a future with their beloved. The soothing melody, combined with K.S. Chitra's enchanting voice, evokes a sense of joy and romance. This song is perfect for weddings and celebrations, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhudhaanaa from Saamy is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With K.S. Chitra's enchanting vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's soulful composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of romance through its beautiful lyrics penned by Thamarai.
stanzaMeanings: Is this the one? Is this the day I was waiting for? Is he the one? Is he the groom who will wear the garland?
The dreams I saw in the day have come true. I am yours, I am yours.
Counting the days to the wedding, my days pass by. I am a happy burden. Without breaking my lips, without raising my voice, I will sing a song for myself.
From now on, the daily drama at home will be sweet.
My shadow hides, searching for your eyes, wandering around.
You will find me in the curve of the balcony, pretending not to see, you will act special.
Will you turn around and trap my waist, holding me at the foot of the stairs?
Fears will hide away, thoughts will escape and hide.
On Sunday afternoon, you will cook with love.
Telling me to watch the show, you will wash the clothes.
In the town, everyone will tremble seeing you, but at home, you will smile like a child.
In pride, my face still shines. The world of two will shrink into two. In happiness, my heart will bloom.
Will my height grow a little more?
